name: cortex
description: Remembers your decisions, coding conventions, and debugging lessons across every Claude Code session. Persistent local memory for AI coding agents.

cortex_url.description: Cortex server URL (leave blank for local solo mode, or enter your team server URL e.g. https://cortex.myteam.com:7437)

cortex_api_key.description: API key for team server authentication (leave blank for local solo mode)
